title: 3001 Admin Assistant/School/Marine Terrace
description:
School Name：
CHIJ Katong Convent

Contract Period

From 20 Feb 2026 to 31 Dec 2027.

Working Hour

  • Mondays to Wednesdays and Fridays: 6:45am to 4:15pm, inclusive of 1hr lunch break
  • Thursdays: 6:45am to 3:45pm, inclusive of 1hr lunch break
  • Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays

Job Scopes

The Services required are set out as follows:

Duties:

  • Manage front desk operations, handle telephone inquiries, and relay messages to appropriate personnel
  • Attend to sick / injured students
  • Contact parents of sick / injured students
  • Perform data entry work to support various school administrative functions
  • Assist to maintain accurate records of lost and found items, students resting in the sick bay, incidents and early release of students
  • Maintain stationeries/paper inventory
  • Housekeep the front desk area to ensure it remains orderly and professional
  • Issuance and recording of uniform on loan to students and ensure timely return in good order
  • Assist to keep the cupboards in the General Office clean and tidy, including those for the stationeries and uniform, to maintain an efficient working environment
  • Distribute mails to designated recipients in a timely manner.
  • Ensure items to be distributed are cleared and collected.
  • Inform teachers of their deliveries
  • Issue Report Books to students
  • Issue Graduation Certificates to graduated students.
  • Contact students for ad-hoc NRIC collection.
  • Help to pack items according to classes for distribution
  • Assist with lamination and binding of documents
  • Assist to update new staff name labeling at the pigeon holes
  • Perform other general administrative tasks as delegated by school management

Requirements

Qualification, Skill & Experience of the Contractor's Personnel

  • The Personnel shall minimally have the following qualification: At least 5 GCE O-Level passes
  • The Personnel should preferably have the following skills and experience:A minimum of 3 years of reception duties experience or equivalentAt least 3 years of experience using Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Word

postedCompany.description:
MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
